name: the IaC rule set denies a proposed Terraform violation in memory before it is written
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"main.tf","content":"resource \"aws_security_group\" \"b\" { ingress { cidr_blocks = [\"0.0.0.0/0\"] } }\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress' e.txt && echo iac-denied-prewrite 1>&2
